ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "pw_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "firstname" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "lastname" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user resides */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode where the user resides */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the user belongs to */,
  "user_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the account was locked out due to too many failed login attempts */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "two_factor_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if two-factor authentication is enabled for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the company was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the company's information */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the company account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_levels" (
  "user_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user level */,
  "user_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the user level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user level */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON or text field containing a list of permissions associated with the user level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting a password reset */,
  "token" TEXT /* Token used for password reset */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the password reset request expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the password reset request was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the password reset request (e.g., pending, completed, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose account was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., password update, role change) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change (e.g., old and new values) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose session it is */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Date the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Date the session ended */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the session was started */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to start the session */,
  "session_data" TEXT /* JSON or text field containing session-specific data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each failed login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who attempted to log in */,
  "attempt_date" TEXT /* Date the attempt was made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the attempt */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the login attempt was successful */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the login attempt (e.g., reason for failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_metadata_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the membership belongs to */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was added to the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the group membership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_memberships_group_name FOREIGN KEY ("group_name") REFERENCES groups ("group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., login, logout, password reset) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event (e.g., old and new values) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the event was triggered */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to trigger the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
